description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is predominantly orange with two broad, white horizontal reflective stripes encircling its midsection and upper portion, both of which show signs of weathering and dirt. The surface of the cone is visibly worn, with scuff marks, fading, and grime, suggesting extensive outdoor use. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, matching the orange color of the rest of the cone. The base is flat, square, and appears to be made of a heavier material to prevent tipping, with visible dirt and wear around its edges. No logos, text, or additional markings are present on the cone.
description: A weathered orange traffic cone with two wide white reflective stripes and a square, stable base, showing signs of outdoor use and dirt.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cone's pointed tip, two wide white reflective stripes, and a square base with visible dirt and wear.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the same features, with the reflective stripes and base wear more pronounced on the left side.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, with the cone's surface wear and grime most visible on the right side of the base.
description_view_3: Final view showing the cone's pointed tip and the reflective stripes, with the base's dirt and scuff marks most prominent on the right.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the top and one at mid-height.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or additional features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and relatively thick, likely weighted for stability, with visible dirt and scuff marks.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks, fading, and grime from outdoor use.
